calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Trust Amendment
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Continued To Aug-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dannielle Vogl for Mary Nelson (Trustee).
Ava Whitmire (Petitioner/Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Vogl stated that it is unclear to the Trustee if the petition is in a position to proceed, and if so, requests a referral to pro bono mediation with the right to preserve her right to file objections. Ms. Whitmire stated that she had asked for mediation and was denied. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 21, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 26, 2017. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust and Trust Amendment is continued to and the Parties are to return on August 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. If the matter is not resolved by July 26, 2017, any objections are to be in writing and the parties are to meet and confer and have a plan on how to go forward.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Continued To May-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ava Whitmire in Propria Persona.
Dannielle Vogl for Mary Nelson (Trustee).

The Court noted that the petition is not in shape to continue for the reasons indicated in the Probate Examiner's notes (names and addresses of the current and contingent beneficiaries is needed). Ms. Whitmire stated that she is in the process of getting it done. Ms. Vogl stated that she is here to know what the status on the petition is, that the Trustee and some of the contingent Beneficiaries met, and that there was a proposal to reach a settlement, but they hit a block. Ms. Vogl also stated that if the petition proceeds, they will object. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust and Trust Amendment is continued to April 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed the parties of pro bono mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
